positive: A whimsical and elegant stylized celestial garden scene, featuring deep indigo and sapphire blues contrasted with iridescent gold and creamy white accents. The main subject is a cluster of stylized, glowing lunar blossoms and floating abstract constellations arranged in a symmetrical, circular mandala pattern. Incorporate stylized mythical flora, bioluminescent elements, and delicate cosmic dust trails. The overall composition must be highly printable and centered, designed for apparel fabric. Use strong outlines, clean flat vectors, and a clean silhouette style reminiscent of Art Nouveau illustration meets modern minimalism. High contrast, perfect symmetry, magical, serene.
